title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw to Enter Into and Sign a Memorandum of Agreement with Hospital Facilities Within the Municipality of Los Baños, Laguna, for the Hearing Loss Screening of Newborn Babies Delivered At, and Referred by the Los Baños Birthing Home, Rhu1. (AUTHOR : COUNCILOR MARK LESTER B. DIZON, 03/07/2022)
